title: Gartner names monday.com a 2025 Leader in Adaptive Project Management & Reporting

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Gartner_Social_1 (1)2160×2160 184 KB

Gartner_Social_2 (2)2160×2160 255 KB

Gartner_Social_3 (2)4320×4320 498 KB

And…we did it AGAIN!

Gartner has named monday.com a Leader in Adaptive Project Management & Reporting for the 4th year in a row - positioned furthest in both vision and execution!

The monday.com team believes we are transforming how organizations turn strategic vision into flawless execution. Our AI-first approach isn’t just innovative, it’s industry-leading.

Here’s to building products people actually love to use

Read the full 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant report here → monday.com is a 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ Leader for Adaptive Project Management and Reporting

And let’s celebrate together in the comments below!
